commands.review_summary:
The PR threads the selected Codex harness/runtime through embedded-agent compaction fallback paths so OpenAI Codex OAuth sessions use `openai-codex` instead of direct `openai` API-key auth, with focused regression tests and a root shrinkwrap sync.

PR surface: Source +22, Tests +230, Other -17. Total +235 across 15 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main hardcodes compaction target runtime to `openclaw`, and the linked report/comments give concrete Codex OAuth fallback failures without `OPENAI_API_KEY`; I did not run a live OAuth repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human maintainer handling is needed because the missing live proof and dirty merge state are merge blockers that a read-only review cannot clear, and the maintainer label protects cleanup closure.

target.title: fix(agents): preserve Codex auth for compaction fallback
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #86820.

OpenAI compaction now preserves the selected Codex runtime route when the session actually ran under the Codex harness. That lets Codex OAuth sessions load compaction models through `openai-codex` instead of falling back to direct `openai` API-key auth.

The fix is intentionally selected-runtime scoped: direct OpenAI API-key sessions, OpenClaw fallback sessions, and custom OpenAI-compatible base URLs stay on their existing direct OpenAI path. Delegated context-engine compaction now carries `agentHarnessId` back into the runtime bridge so timeout/overflow recovery keeps the same selected harness.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compaction-runtime-context.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.hooks.test.ts src/agents/openai-codex-routing.test.ts src/context-engine/context-engine.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:prod`
- `pnpm check:test-types`
- `pnpm lint --threads=8`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `/Users/steipete/Projects/agent-scripts/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Codex OAuth-backed OpenAI compaction no longer drops the selected Codex runtime route and asks for direct OpenAI API-key auth during manual, queued, delegated timeout, or delegated overflow compaction.

Real environment tested: Local source checkout with focused regression tests, type checks, lint, and Codex autoreview; no live Codex OAuth account flow was executed from this checkout.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: focused Vitest command above; `pnpm tsgo:prod`; `pnpm check:test-types`; `pnpm lint --threads=8`; `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`; branch autoreview command above.

Evidence after fix: Regression tests cover selected Codex runtime routing through `openai-codex`, OpenClaw/direct OpenAI preservation when Codex was only implicit, model-only and provider/model compaction overrides, custom OpenAI-compatible base URL preservation, queued context-engine runtime context, and delegated runtime context carrying `agentHarnessId`.

Observed result after fix: Focused Vitest passed 6 files and 204 tests; production and test type checks exited cleanly; oxlint exited cleanly; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.

What was not tested: A live installed OpenClaw gateway with real Codex OAuth compaction and no `OPENAI_API_KEY`.
target.author: steipete
